poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the agent or runner instance that released the job.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance.

jobId.description: Provider-specific identifier for the released job.

jobResult.description: Optional normalized outcome of the released job.

jobDurationMs.description: Optional job run duration in milliseconds.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as exit codes or stage summaries.
